/Users/zhengzixuan/.claude/cache/changelog.md:- Fixed several plugin issues: installation failing on Windows with `EEXIST` error in OneDrive folders, marketplace blocking user-scope installs when a project-scope install exists, `CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_CACHE_DIR` creating literal `~` directories, and `plugin.json` with marketplace-only fields failing to load
/Users/zhengzixuan/.claude/cache/changelog.md:- Fixed literal `nul` file creation on Windows when the model uses CMD-style `2>nul` redirection in Git Bash
/Users/zhengzixuan/.claude/cache/changelog.md:- Fixed: Bash tool no longer throws "Bad substitution" errors when heredocs contain JavaScript template literals like `${index + 1}`, which previously interrupted tool execution
/Users/zhengzixuan/.claude/cache/changelog.md:- Fixed a crash when running bash commands containing heredocs with JavaScript template literals like `${index + 1}`

Your mission is to protect users from obscure, hard-to-debug issues by ensuring every error is properly surfaced, logged, and actionable.
/Users/zhengzixuan/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/claude-plugins-official/plugins/skill-creator/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md:The skill creator is liable to be used by people across a wide range of familiarity with coding jargon. If you haven't heard (and how could you, it's only very recently that it started), there's a trend now where the power of Claude is inspiring plumbers to open up their terminals, parents and grandparents to google "how to install npm". On the other hand, the bulk of users are probably fairly computer-literate.
/Users/zhengzixuan/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/claude-plugins-official/plugins/skill-creator/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md:1. **Generalize from the feedback.** The big picture thing that's happening here is that we're trying to create skills that can be used a million times (maybe literally, maybe even more who knows) across many different prompts. Here you and the user are iterating on only a few examples over and over again because it helps move faster. The user knows these examples in and out and it's quick for them to assess new outputs. But if the skill you and the user are codeveloping works only for those examples, it's useless. Rather than put in fiddly overfitty changes, or oppressively constrictive MUSTs, if there's some stubborn issue, you might try branching out and using different metaphors, or recommending different patterns of working. It's relatively cheap to try and maybe you'll land on something great.

/Users/zhengzixuan/.claude/projects/-Users-zhengzixuan/5369007b-0ef8-429a-9bfb-85653f136b69.jsonl:{"parentUuid":"bd8437cc-2bd5-49eb-a726-37629686a3ea","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"6157c9ab-23dd-4ceb-8f52-f24a888ad1e9","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":"cat > ~/clean-proxy/proxy.js << 'EOF'\nconst express = require('express');\nconst https = require('https');\nconst app = express();\n\napp.use(express.json());\n\n// 模型列表：注册一个Claude Code绝对认识的模型名\napp.get('/v1/models', (req, res) => {\n    res.json({\n        object: 'list',\n        data: [\n            { id: 'claude-3-haiku-20240307', object: 'model', created: 0, owned_by: 'spark' }\n        ]\n    });\n});\n\n// 对话\napp.post('/v1/chat/completions', async (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const cleanBody = JSON.stringify({\n            model: 'lite',\n            messages: req.body.messages || [],\n            stream: false\n        });\n        \n        const options = {\n            hostname: 'spark-api-open.xf-yun.com',\n            path: '/v1/chat/completions',\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: {\n                'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n                'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(cleanBody),\n                'Authorization': 'Bearer ETqUhynPAOZpFxmMfBSt:xWWbCpmluONOgYpHwygn'\n            }\n        };\n        \n        const proxyReq = https.request(options, (proxyRes) => {\n            let data = '';\n            proxyRes.on('data', (chunk) => { data += chunk; });\n            proxyRes.on('end', () => {\n                try {\n                    const sparkResponse = JSON.parse(data);\n                    const realContent = sparkResponse.choices[0].message.content;\n                    \n                    // 伪装成 Claude 3 Haiku 的响应格式\n                    res.json({\n                        id: 'msg_' + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 10),\n                        type: 'message',\n                        role: 'assistant',\n                        model: 'claude-3-haiku-20240307',\n                        content: [{\n                            type: 'text',\n                            text: realContent\n                        }],\n                        stop_reason: 'end_turn',\n                        stop_sequence: null,\n                        usage: {\n                            input_tokens: sparkResponse.usage?.prompt_tokens || 0,\n                            output_tokens: sparkResponse.usage?.completion_tokens || 0\n                        }\n                    });\n                } catch (e) {\n                    res.status(200).send(data);\n                }\n            });\n        });\n        \n        proxyReq.on('error', (e) => {\n            res.status(500).send({ error: e.message });\n        });\n        \n        proxyReq.write(cleanBody);\n        proxyReq.end();\n    } catch (e) {\n        res.status(400).send({ error: 'Invalid JSON' });\n    }\n});\n\napp.listen(3456, () => {\n    console.log('✅ 伪装版代理已启动 → http://127.0.0.1:3456');\n});\nEOF\n\ncd ~/clean-proxy && node proxy.js"},"uuid":"998ea0ac-1031-45ac-8368-1102c65ee9da","timestamp":"2026-05-23T16:36:31.250Z","permissionMode":"default","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/zhengzixuan","sessionId":"5369007b-0ef8-429a-9bfb-85653f136b69","version":"2.1.150","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

/Users/zhengzixuan/.claude/history.jsonl:{"display":"/model lite","pastedContents":{},"timestamp":1779548780889,"project":"/Users/zhengzixuan","sessionId":"f9976822-0b1b-4991-a681-8696c32cab78"}
/Users/zhengzixuan/.claude/history.jsonl:{"display":"cat > ~/clean-proxy/proxy.js << 'EOF'\nconst express = require('express');\nconst https = require('https');\nconst app = express();\n\napp.use(express.json());\n\n// 模型列表：注册一个Claude Code绝对认识的模型名\napp.get('/v1/models', (req, res) => {\n    res.json({\n        object: 'list',\n        data: [\n            { id: 'claude-3-haiku-20240307', object: 'model', created: 0, owned_by: 'spark' }\n        ]\n    });\n});\n\n// 对话\napp.post('/v1/chat/completions', async (req, res) => {\n    try {\n        const cleanBody = JSON.stringify({\n            model: 'lite',\n            messages: req.body.messages || [],\n            stream: false\n        });\n        \n        const options = {\n            hostname: 'spark-api-open.xf-yun.com',\n            path: '/v1/chat/completions',\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: {\n                'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n                'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(cleanBody),\n                'Authorization': 'Bearer ETqUhynPAOZpFxmMfBSt:xWWbCpmluONOgYpHwygn'\n            }\n        };\n        \n        const proxyReq = https.request(options, (proxyRes) => {\n            let data = '';\n            proxyRes.on('data', (chunk) => { data += chunk; });\n            proxyRes.on('end', () => {\n                try {\n                    const sparkResponse = JSON.parse(data);\n                    const realContent = sparkResponse.choices[0].message.content;\n                    \n                    // 伪装成 Claude 3 Haiku 的响应格式\n                    res.json({\n                        id: 'msg_' + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 10),\n                        type: 'message',\n                        role: 'assistant',\n                        model: 'claude-3-haiku-20240307',\n                        content: [{\n                            type: 'text',\n                            text: realContent\n                        }],\n                        stop_reason: 'end_turn',\n                        stop_sequence: null,\n                        usage: {\n                            input_tokens: sparkResponse.usage?.prompt_tokens || 0,\n                            output_tokens: sparkResponse.usage?.completion_tokens || 0\n                        }\n                    });\n                } catch (e) {\n                    res.status(200).send(data);\n                }\n            });\n        });\n        \n        proxyReq.on('error', (e) => {\n            res.status(500).send({ error: e.message });\n        });\n        \n        proxyReq.write(cleanBody);\n        proxyReq.end();\n    } catch (e) {\n        res.status(400).send({ error: 'Invalid JSON' });\n    }\n});\n\napp.listen(3456, () => {\n    console.log('✅ 伪装版代理已启动 → http://127.0.0.1:3456');\n});\nEOF\n\ncd ~/clean-proxy && node proxy.js","pastedContents":{},"timestamp":1779554191243,"project":"/Users/zhengzixuan","sessionId":"5369007b-0ef8-429a-9bfb-85653f136b69"}
